====Status unknown====
When fighting three {{tc|Team Magma Grunt}}s at [[Mt. Chimney]] in Pokémon Ruby, Emerald, and Omega Ruby, Archie is seen with a {{p|Poochyena}}. It is unknown if this Poochyena is related to his Mightyena.

|-
| {{InactivePoké|Archie|Poochyena|261Poochyena.png|Dark|size=96px|link=no}}
|}
